# Nginx Virtual Host Jinja2 Template (Ansible)

## Overview

This file:

`templates/nginx-vhost.conf.j2`

is a **Jinja2 template** used by Ansible to dynamically generate an Nginx virtual host configuration.

---

## Purpose

- Automates Nginx configuration
- Uses variables instead of hardcoding values
- Works across multiple servers and applications

---

## Template Code

```jinja2
# Managed by Ansible -- do not edit manually
server {
    listen {{ http_port | default(80) }};
    server_name {{ ansible_hostname }};

    root /var/www/{{ app_name }};
    index index.html;

    location / {
        try_files $uri $uri/ =404;
    }

    access_log /var/log/nginx/{{ app_name }}_access.log;
    error_log /var/log/nginx/{{ app_name }}_error.log;
}
```

---

## Explanation

### Managed Comment
Indicates the file is automatically generated by Ansible.

---

### Port Configuration
```jinja2
listen {{ http_port | default(80) }};
```
- Uses variable `http_port`
- Defaults to 80 if not provided

---

### Server Name
```jinja2
server_name {{ ansible_hostname }};
```
- Uses system hostname automatically

---

### Root Directory
```jinja2
root /var/www/{{ app_name }};
```
- Dynamically sets app directory

---

### Index File
```jinja2
index index.html;
```
- Default file served

---

### Request Handling
```jinja2
location / {
    try_files $uri $uri/ =404;
}
```
- Serves file if exists
- Otherwise returns 404

---

### Logs
```jinja2
access_log /var/log/nginx/{{ app_name }}_access.log;
error_log /var/log/nginx/{{ app_name }}_error.log;
```
- Creates app-specific log files

---

## Example Variables

```yaml
http_port: 8080
app_name: myapp
ansible_hostname: web01
```

---

## Rendered Output

```nginx
server {
    listen 8080;
    server_name web01;

    root /var/www/myapp;
    index index.html;

    location / {
        try_files $uri $uri/ =404;
    }

    access_log /var/log/nginx/myapp_access.log;
    error_log /var/log/nginx/myapp_error.log;
}
```

---

## Summary

This template allows you to:
- Reuse the same config for multiple apps
- Automatically generate configs using variables
- Maintain consistency across servers

---

## Simple Explanation (Roman Urdu)

“Yeh template Nginx config ko dynamic banata hai, jahan variables ke through har server ya app ke liye automatically configuration generate hoti hai.”
